title: clusia cochliformis
intro: Clusia cochliformis, also known as the Clusia tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clusia cochliformis include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Clusia cochliformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
